Name: NOI
nepa_event_description__c: Notice of Intent filed; NEPA scoping initiated.

Name: Scoping Open
nepa_event_description__c: Scoping period opened; public scoping meetings scheduled.

Name: Scoping Complete
nepa_event_description__c: Scoping period closed; final scope of issues identified.

Name: Comment Period Open
nepa_event_description__c: 45-day public comment period on Draft EIS opened.

Name: Comment Period Closed
nepa_event_description__c: Public comment period on Draft EIS closed.

Name: ROD Issued
nepa_event_description__c: Record of Decision signed; project approved.

Name: Decision Issued
nepa_event_description__c: Final agency decision recorded; project authorization complete.
